steps.name: knot-services
steps.summary: Implemented knotAuthHeader, knotFetch, getTransaction, syncTransactions, syncCart, checkout; added CartItem type; unit tests pass

steps.name: knot-webhook
steps.summary: Implemented POST /api/knot/webhook with HMAC-SHA256 verification, transaction classification, DB inserts, and conditional outbox enqueue; added txn_ok EventKind; 4 AC tests pass

steps.name: knot-session
steps.summary: Implemented POST /api/knot/session returning { ok, sessionToken }; added /onboarding placeholder page; typecheck passes

steps.name: pantry-reorder
steps.summary: Added reorder logic to pantry capture: low/empty items trigger syncCart+checkout or approval-request iMessage if total >2× max_single_txn; reorder_placed/reorder_pending_approval events inserted; typecheck passes

steps.name: command-router-commerce
steps.summary: Extended commandRouter with approve (✓ Approved.), block (✗ Blocked.), bare reorder (inventoryAssessment on last pantry snapshot), and rules intents; 9 tests pass
